title: Verify existing implementation of isTokenExpired
description: The isTokenExpired(token: string): boolean function already exists in src/auth/token-utils.ts. It decodes JWT and checks the exp claim. Tests exist in src/auth/token-utils.test.ts covering: valid non-expired tokens (returns false), expired tokens (returns true), and malformed tokens (returns true). No additional work needed.
existing_patterns: src/auth/jwt-service.ts - JwtService.signAccessToken and sign methods for generating test tokens
src/utils/result.ts - discriminated union error handling pattern
